intro: Test day: incline §5 AMRAP/TM re-test due (Adj #126) — top set 1×5 @ 145, then AMRAP @ 130 (80% TM 162), new TM = 90% of e1RM. Bumps: rear-delt fly 130→135 (Adj #130), decline crunch BW → +10 lb DB or 25 lb plate (Adj #131), pushdown 22.5→25 re-attempt pain-gated (Adj #136). TT week — nothing unprescribed before Fri (Adj #142).

table.cue: Stop at form breakdown; new TM = 90% of e1RM (Adj #126). W8 benchmark: 135×10
Hold 30 — openers soft, back half tightening (Adj #127)
Re-attempt (Adj #136). Any elbow symptom in warmup or set 1 → stay 22.5; §10.A clock started 7-4, protect it

lift.warmup: General: 1–2 min band pull-aparts + scap push-ups. Wrist-extensor isometric 3×30 s/arm (§10.A pre-lift). Incline BB: bar×8, 95×5, 115×3, 135×2, then 145 top set.
lift.cooldown: Tyler twists 3×15 + reverse Tyler 3×15 (4 s eccentric); daily SI prehab as usual.

currentLoads.note: Hold 145 — set 1 RIR 2 = cleanest opener of the top-of-LP hold, but sets 2-3 dropped reps 5→4 both RIR 0. Not a §5 miss — <24 h post Mon's 6-mi T progression, predicted fatigue-carryover shape. +5→150 gate still wants a cleaner set-3 RIR. TM 162 stands; §5 AMRAP/TM re-test due ~W12 (Adj #126)
160 BUMP LANDED — set 3 clean RIR 1 at 8 reps = the Adj #115 gate met; all 4 sets held the 8-rep floor, same clean-landing shape as the 155 bump. Bump-eligible 165 on a clean set 3 (Adj #133)

Regression — set 1 lost the Adj #116 headroom (RIR 0 vs RIR 2), sets 2-3 dropped to 8 reps, all to failure, on a fresh + fed day. Hold 75, rebuild stalled; ladder still needs sets 1-2 both ≥RIR 1 (Adj #134)
6-set growth dose; openers still soft (RIR 3/3/3/3), but back half tightening across the block — set 5 RIR 2 and set 6 = 14 reps to failure. Hold 30 — don't bump on soft openers (Adj #127)
In-band spread REPEATED — all 4 sets inside 12-15 for the second straight Sat = the Adj #117 condition met; sets 3-4 at 14, last to failure. Bump 35 next Sat. Tue slot unaffected (Adj #137)
Tue-slot 60→65 BUMP LANDED — set 1 RIR 2 = exactly the reserve Adj #118 asked for. Splits from the Sat slot per the §3.A 4×10 vs §3.B 4×12 rep-target mismatch. Hold 65 at Tue (Adj #128)

Opener finally clean — set 1 hit the 12-rep target at RIR 1 (the exact Adj #118 set-1 target), but sets 2-4 fell 11/9/8, all to failure = not clean with reps to spare. Hold 60 at Sat; 65 re-attempt still needs a full clean outing (Adj #139)

Hold-until-clean SATISFIED — set 3 clean RIR 1 breaks the three-outing 12/12/12/6 pattern, set 4 held 11 at the last-set push. 25 re-attempt eligible, pain-gated. Elbow fully symptom-free this session — §10.A 4-wk clock STARTS 7-4 (Adj #136)
Running soft — RIR 4/4, second consecutive week of softening. Bump-eligible 135 next Tue as an Adj #95-style one-step intensity correction, role unchanged joint-health (Adj #130)

345 BUMP LANDED — the Adj #120 re-attempt fired on the required clean lift-day AM read and swept 4×12. But every set to true failure = zero headroom. Hold 345 — no 355 until sets 1-3 show ≥RIR 1; recheck AM Achilles before W12 Mon (Adj #135)

currentLoads.load: BW → add small load BOTH slots (~10 lb DB / 25 lb plate): next Tue + next Sat
currentLoads.note: Sat-slot add-load gate MET — set 3 RIR 2 clears the Adj #122 requirement at §3.B 3×10, openers RIR 3 = real headroom. Both slots now gated through; target set 3 ≥RIR 1-2 at the new load each (Adj #131/#138)
Skipped W11 Sat per the §6 cut order — the Adj #121 regression read goes untested. Hold 130, re-evaluate on its next outing (Adj #140)
